---
title: "Moje Poznámky"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warnings=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
```

#Korelace a regrese:
```{r}
df <- read.csv("StudentsPerformance.csv")
model1 <- lm(df$reading.score ~ df$math.score)
model2 <- lm(df$writing.score ~ df$math.score)
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

plot(df$math.score, df$reading.score, xlab="math score", ylab ="reading score",
     main = paste("Pearson=",round(cor(df$reading.score,df$math.score),5),
     "\nSpearman=",round(cor(df$reading.score,df$math.score,method = "spearman"),5)))
abline(model1, col="blue")
plot(df$math.score, df$writing.score, xlab="math score", ylab ="writing score",
     main = paste("Pearson=",round(cor(df$writing.score,df$math.score),5),
     "\nSpearman=",round(cor(df$writing.score,df$math.score,method = "spearman"),5)))
```


abline(model2, col="blue")
